creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
I've just installed net-mgmt/snmptt and got these

Nov 11 15:40:10 octans snmptt-sys[0]: SNMPTT v1.3 started
Nov 11 15:40:11 octans snmptt-sys[0]: Loading /usr/local/etc/snmp/snmptt.conf
Nov 11 15:40:11 octans snmptt-sys[0]: Finished loading 2 lines from /usr/local/etc/snmp/snmptt.conf
Nov 11 15:40:11 octans snmptt-sys[0]: Could not convert user id 'snmptt' to a numeric UID
Nov 11 15:40:11 octans snmptt-sys[0]: Unable to enter spool dir /var/spool/snmptt/
Nov 11 15:40:46 octans last message repeated 7 times


Here is a couple of problems:
1. There is no 'snmptt' user. Port installation should add this user.
2. There is no /var/spool/snmptt/ directory. Port installation should add this user with right permissions (snmptt ?).
